name: mosui-zouyinlu
description: 墨祟：走阴录 — 水墨俯视角动作肉鸽

scripts.test:syntax: node --check gamedata.js && node --check game.js && node --check mobile-controls.js && node --check robust_test.js && node --check seeded_test.js && node --check .claude/ctx-extract.js && node --check .claude/validate-agent-output.js && node --check .claude/content-block-rules.js && node --check .claude/merge-content-blocks.js && node --check .claude/test-content-block-fixtures.js && node --check .claude/audit-content-invariants.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test:syntax && node smoke_test.js && node wave_test.js && node content_test.js && node stress_test.js && node robust_test.js && node seeded_test.js && node .claude/audit-content-invariants.js --strict
scripts.test:automation: npm run test:block-fixtures && node .claude/fix-test-count.js && node .claude/sequencer.js list
scripts.cap:sync: npm run www && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:open:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
